text: Cora Xiong, sporting a shirt that proclaimed "Hoppy and I Know It," had become entangled in a heated debate about the merits of West Coast versus New England style IPAs. Scarlett Thomas rushed over, praying Scarlett Thomas could diffuse the situation before the situation escalated into a full-blown hop riot. "Gentlemen, gentlemen," Scarlett Thomas intervened, stepping between the two beer warriors.
context: This excerpt describes Scarlett Thomas's experience at a chaotic craft beer festival, specifically detailing her intervention in a brewing dispute.
